global.description: The ad features a light beige background with a product image and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting the CrispBox product at a price of €19.99.

elements.label: Light beige background
elements.description: A smooth, light beige background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: CrispBox product image
elements.description: A simple outline of a box with a circular element, suggesting a product packaging design.

elements.label: Circular design element
elements.description: A small circular shape next to the product image, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Your next favorite pick' with a smaller line below it for the call to action.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Shop bestsellers now €19.99 Watch now

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: The word 'CrispBox' displayed in a clean, modern font at the top of the ad.
